headline: Lexicon Pharmaceuticals vs. Pfizer: Which Drugmaker Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
summary: One company posts rapid revenue growth but remains unprofitable, while the other boasts global scale and steady cash flow. See how their fundamentals stack up.
